parsed_review.summary: CP00-929 descriptor-only HRX AdminPolicy/DeniedState bridge pack passes read-only review: consistent across plan, queue, registry, validators, tests, and contract; all runtime/write/real-data/secret boundaries closed and machine-enforced; Claude read-only non-final-approver and Hermes deterministic-only boundaries intact; no runtime/enterprise-trust claim. One non-blocking P3 noting the final validation ladder is pending and was verified by inspection. No P0/P1/P2.

findings.title: Full closeout validation ladder and Hermes gate recorded as pending_final_validation; reviewer verified boundaries by read-only source inspection
findings.details: command-evidence.json records exit_code 0 for five HRX-scoped commands (node --check on registry.js, validators.js, and validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs; node --test packages/hrx/test/*.test.js; npm run rp30:hrx:validate), but hermes_gate.status is 'pending' (command_ids rp00_control_plane_contract_validate, spec_requirement_validate), gate_outcome is 'pending_final_validation', and validation_summary has review_receipt_ref=null and p0_p1_p2_clear=null. The broader ladder named in the prompt (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) is not yet recorded as executed. As a read-only reviewer I confirmed cross-layer consistency and closed boundaries by inspecting registry.js, validators.js, model.test.js, hrx-people-contract.json, the plan, and the queue; reported command exit codes are treated as reported evidence, not independently re-run.
findings.recommendation: Before flipping manifest status to closed and setting production_ready_flag=hrx_admin_policy_denied_state_bridge_descriptor_verified, run and record the full validation ladder plus the Hermes control-plane/spec-requirement gate, and attach this read-only review as the single valid pack-level review receipt.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected pre-closeout snapshot state; non-blocking. The Codex side runs the final ladder and finalizes adjudication.md and construction-inspection.json after this read-only review.
